highlights.text: Engaged directly by a remote client to build out the frontend for a multi-tenant salon booking platform with three user roles: Super Admin, Salon Admin (B2B), and Customer.

Sliced UI across 60–80 pages spanning all three roles Salon Admin configuration (hair preferences, working hours, location, descriptions), Customer booking flow (search, selection, booking), and Super Admin platform management.
Improved usability and user experience across implemented pages.
Built and maintained a customer-facing landing page reaching users across 90+ countries, with bilingual localization, scroll-based animations, and Google Analytics integration.
Developed an ERP sales dashboard used daily by ~15–20 sales reps, covering end-to-end sales workflows from lead tracking to order management, integrated with multiple REST APIs.
Integrated WhatsApp into internal systems, centralizing 100+ customer conversations and reducing communication fragmentation across channels.
